title: Record & Export Command Recipes
overview: Add a record meta command that captures browse commands executed during a session and exports them as replayable scripts in JSON (chain-compatible), Playwright, or Puppeteer format.
scopeChallenge: Existing code provides most building blocks: chain command is already a recipe format, har/video use the same start/stop UX, command dispatch is a single hook point, Session already stores per-session state. Only new: recording buffer, record subcommands, and three script generators.

failureModes.risk: Recording buffer grows unbounded on long sessions
failureModes.mitigation: Cap at 10,000 steps. Return warning on cap.

failureModes.risk: @ref selectors in exported scripts won't work outside browse
record start called twice silently resets buffer
Exported scripts have wrong API for edge commands
failureModes.mitigation: Only map well-known commands. Everything else becomes a comment.
Exclude record and meta-noise commands from capture.

tasks.title: Add recording state to Session
tasks.description: Add RecordedStep interface and recording field to the Session interface in session-manager.ts. The recording buffer is null when not recording, an array of {command, args, timestamp} when active.
acceptanceCriteria: RecordedStep interface exported with command: string, args: string[], timestamp: number
Session interface has recording: RecordedStep[] | null field, defaults to null in getOrCreate()
Existing session tests still pass (no breaking changes to Session shape)

tasks.title: Hook command dispatch to capture recorded steps
tasks.description: In server.ts handleCommand(), after a command executes successfully, push {command, args, timestamp} to session.recording if recording is active. Skip meta-noise commands.
acceptanceCriteria: When session.recording is not null, every successfully executed command (except record, status, stop, restart, sessions, session-close) is appended
Failed commands (those that throw) are NOT recorded
The recording hook adds zero overhead when recording is inactive

tasks.title: Script generators (JSON, Playwright, Puppeteer)
tasks.description: Create src/record-export.ts with three export functions: exportJSON, exportPlaywright, exportPuppeteer. Each maps browse commands to the target library's API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: exportJSON returns valid JSON parseable by the chain command
exportPlaywright generates a runnable script with correct Playwright API calls
exportPuppeteer generates equivalent Puppeteer script
Unmapped commands emitted as // browse <command> comments
@ref selectors emit a TODO comment

tasks.title: record meta command (start/stop/status/export)
tasks.description: Add record to META_COMMANDS in server.ts and implement the handler in meta.ts with subcommands: start, stop, status, export json|playwright|puppeteer [path]. Update CLI help text and SAFE_TO_RETRY.
acceptanceCriteria: record start returns 'Recording started' and captures subsequent commands
record stop returns step count and clears the buffer
record status returns state + count or 'No active recording'
record export json/playwright/puppeteer writes correct output to file
record export without recording returns clear error
record start while already recording returns error

tasks.title: Integration tests
tasks.description: Add tests in test/features.test.ts covering the full record→export flow across all three formats, plus edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: full flow record start → goto → click → fill → stop → export json/playwright/puppeteer
Test: export playwright contains page.goto(), page.click(), page.fill()
Test: export puppeteer contains page.goto(), page.click(), page.type()
Test: record start while recording throws error
Test: record export with no recording throws error
Test: record status returns correct state
All existing tests still pass

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md and README
tasks.description: Add record command documentation to both SKILL.md files and README.md. Add permission rule, update command counts, add changelog entry.
acceptanceCriteria: record start|stop|status|export documented in command reference
Permission rule Bash(browse record:*) added to SKILL.md
README changelog updated
No incorrect command counts introduced
